query: UPDATE projects p JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id SET p.totalAmount = CAST(q.total AS DECIMAL(15,2)) WHERE p.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND p.deletedAt IS NULL AND (p.totalAmount IS NULL OR p.totalAmount = 0);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute UPDATE projects p JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id SET p.totalAmount = CAST(q.total AS DECIMAL(15,2)) WHERE p.dataOrigin = 'manual' AND p.deletedAt IS NULL AND (p.totalAmount IS NULL OR p.totalAmount = 0);
